title: Monetary and Fiscal Policy - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Monetary and Fiscal Policy Monetary and Fiscal Policy
- Obiageri Ndukwe Obiageri Ndukwe is a Senior Analyst in the Financial and Enterprise Risk Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial and Enterprise Risk , Credit Risk Advisory Office Research Field(s) : Financial Institutions , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Public Finance , Risk Management
- Rishi Vala Rishi Vala is a Principal Economist in the Financial Markets Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Markets and Banking Department , Monetary Policy and Fiscal Agent Studies Division Research Field(s) : Asset Pricing , Empirical Finance , Financial Economics , Financial Markets , International Trade and Finance , Market Microstructure , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Monetary Economics
